basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust (NBT) has released the official Executive - International Outreach Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NBT Executive - International Outreach Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 30 and 40 years with a Graduation in International Relations, English, Mass Communication, Humanities or a related discipline, along with a Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations, Public Policy, Communication, Development Studies, Foreign Languages, and 3–5 years of relevant experience, can apply offline up to

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 18-06-2026 (07 days from the date of publishing of this advertisement on NBT website.)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in International Relations / English / Mass Communication / Humanities or any related discipline from a recognized university, Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations / Public Policy / Communication / Development Studies / Foreign Languages, Minimum 3-5 years of experience in international engagement, partnerships, outreach, or coordination roles
qualification.details: Executive – International Outreach: Graduation in International Relations / English / Mass Communication / Humanities or any related discipline from a recognized university. Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations / Public Policy / Communication / Development Studies / Foreign Languages. Minimum 3-5 years of experience in international engagement, partnerships, outreach, or coordination roles in a government organization / international organization / embassy / reputed institution.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download National Book Trust Executive – International Outreach Job 2026 Notific

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the National Book Trust Executive – International Outreach recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the National Book Trust Executive – International Outreach position is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive – International Outreach post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation in International Relations, English, Mass Communication, Humanities, or a related field. A Postgraduate degree or diploma in International Relations, Public Policy, Communication, Development Studies, or Foreign Languages is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Executive – International Outreach position is between 30 years and 40 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Executive – International Outreach role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Executive – International Outreach post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Executive – International Outreach position in the National Book Trust.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the National Book Trust recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Executive – International Outreach role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3-5 years of experience in international engagement, partnerships, outreach, or coordination roles is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Book Trust, www.nbtindia.gov.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.
